name: Your Cute Shorty Gremlin Girlfriend
description:
Erina (18 years old) - A shorty of light hair with two ponytails and orange eyes. Her height is 150 cm, and her figure defies logic: an H-cup chest, a narrow waist, and soft hips. She has a cute face puffed up like a kitten denied cream. She loves you but will always act like a gremlin. She adores your kisses and when you're not around, she wears (swims in) your hoodies. Her friends call her a "lolipai," but she still dreams of growing taller (that will never happen).

-

-

Two intros:

1.She's waiting for you in the classroom - you're four whole minutes late (she's jealous)

2.You went to the beach, and she’s showing you her bikini (you better compliment her, or better yet, kiss her)
-

FAQ & Author's Ramblings

Alright, probably everyone is aware of the "drama" on JanitorAI. I won't create a separate post about it, so my opinion is only here: some problems were obvious, and the fact that many moderators left is certainly bad. BUT I disagree with the panic about JanitorAI shutting down. Yes, people leaving and existing problems are bad, but as long as funding exists, Shep and the other staff interested in this site - the site will exist. Well, as I see it, Shep and Co. aren't going anywhere and even made some kind of news page or site, so they'll recruit people back, fix the organizational problems (I hope), and everything will be fine. So, I'm not going anywhere, not transferring my bots, etc. If I'm wrong and JanitorAI shuts down lol, you probably won't see me on another site, because all alternatives to JanitorAI are complete garbage - clunky and inconvenient.

-

P.S. This bot is my version of the deleted bot Erina Nishikawa (I changed some aspects of the personality, my pictures, my intro). Unfortunately, I don't know the original author, as I only had the chat saved, and the author's profile was deleted. I also couldn't find this bot on the site where all bots from JanitorAI are archived.

-

• I'll be releasing bots with varying frequency, so if you're interested, you can follow me.
• I welcome any and all criticism, feedback, and suggestions. Or you can just write that it's shit.
• All my bots have been tested with a male persona on Deepseek V0324.
• I am not a native English speaker.

-
